privileged_info_summary: DOCUMENT GENERATION: Document is synthetically generated using python-docx with tracked changes from two reviewers (Maria Santos and James Park). REQUIRED CONTENT: All 8 required_text items are correctly specified and will appear in the final document after the agent properly accepts/rejects changes. FORBIDDEN CONTENT: Both forbidden_text items ('may acknowledge receipt' and '30 business days') are tracked changes that will be correctly absent after rejecting the specified changes. KEY POINTS: Agent must ACCEPT changes for 'written or electronic request', '5 business days', fee sentence, 'mail, email, or in-person pickup', and 'designated Records Officer'. Agent must REJECT deletions of ORS exemption sentence and Appeal Process paragraph, and REJECT change from '10 business days' to '30 business days'. DATA SOURCE: Content is fictional (Linn County SOP) and synthetically generated, not from external data source.
